Event: Cornucopia Island June 2026
Event Date: 08/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: W52
Prism Shard Orb

Once in a while, the units launches a magic orb at the enemy unit with the greatest spell power. The orb bounces up to 3 times. When the orb hits, it steals 20% of all stats from the target for 5 sec., deals 975000 pure damage and removes armor from the target. When their armor is removed, the target loses 55% of the armor stats, and becomes unable to use the armor's abilities for 4 sec. The orb also removes the target's weapon. For 4 sec., the disarmed enemy unit cannot use the weapon abilities. The orb has a 65% chance to freeze all enemy units in a small radius around the unit hit with the orb as well. For 3 sec., the frozen enemy units are unable to move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
